title: Associate Director Marketing
description:
**Associate Director- Marketing**

  

**About Urban Company**

Urban Company is a technology platform offering customers a variety of services at home. Customers use our platform to book services such as beauty treatments, haircuts, massage therapy, cleaning, plumbing, carpentry, appliance repair, painting etc., all delivered in the comfort of their home and at a time of their choosing. We promise our customers a high-quality, standardized and reliable service experience. To fulfill this promise, we work closely with our hand-picked service partners, enabling them with technology, training, products, tools, financing, insurance, and brand, helping them succeed and deliver on this promise.

  

Urban Company started out as UrbanClap in Nov 2014, when its founders, Abhiraj, Raghav and Varun realized that the home services industry was predominantly unorganized, fragmented and offline. Customers found it difficult to avail quality services in a convenient manner, and service professionals were struggling to make ends meet, having to rely upon several middlemen, contractors, and local aggregators. The founders felt that the industry was ripe for disruption, and launched Urban Company, with three key principles in mind -

*   Customer love: Build a platform that offers truly delightful and differentiated services
*   Partner empowerment: Build a deep, full-stack partnership with service partners, helping improve their earnings and overall livelihood
*   Technology first: Bring innovation and technology to an age-old industry.

  

**What will you do?**

As a leader for Cleaning & Pest Control, you will be the "CEO of Demand" for our largest and most complex business cluster, covering Bathroom & Kitchen Cleaning, Full Home Deep Cleaning, and Pest Control. Your mandate is to move the needle on top-line growth while building a brand that customers trust for their most intimate home needs.

  

**Key Responsibilities**

1\. **Consumer Insight & Empathy**: Go beyond the data. Spend time with customers and service partners to understand the "why" behind the "what." Identify the triggers and barriers for professional cleaning versus the unorganized sector.

  

2\. **Growth Charter & Problem Identification**: Take a first-principles approach to identify why a category isn't growing faster. Is it a frequency issue? A trust deficit? You will define the 6-12 month roadmap to unlock exponential growth.

  

3\. **Full-Stack Brand Marketing**: Lead the creative and media strategy for the cleaning cluster. Whether it’s a massive TVC or a hyper-targeted digital "InstaHelp" campaign, you will ensure the brand remains salient and "top of mind."

  

4\. **Pricing & Revenue Strategy**: Own the P&L levers. You will design pricing experiments, loyalty constructs, and promotional guardrails to optimize for both market share and unit economics.

  

**Who Should Apply?**

● You have experience in brand/content management, growth in start ups, or top-tier consulting.

● You get a kick out of building things and growing them, you aren’t afraid of ambiguity.

● You are comfortable with data analytics and data visualization but can also write a compelling creative brief that inspires an agency.

● First-Principles Thinker: You don't do things because "that's how it's done." You question every assumption until you find the most efficient path to growth.

● Cultural Fit: You thrive in high-intensity environments, value radical candor, and have a deep sense of ownership.

  

**What Can You Expect?**

● Unmatched Ownership: You are the primary driver of a multi-hundred crore business vertical.

● High-Growth Environment: A seat on a rocket ship that is scaling globally.

● Peer Excellence: Work alongside some of the sharpest minds from IIMs, ISB, and top global firms. ● Impact: The opportunity to build a brand that changes the lives of thousands of service professionals and millions of households.

title: Director of Product Marketing
description:
**Director of Product Marketing**

**Location:** Bengaluru, India

**Department:** Product Marketing

  

**About the Role**

We are looking for a Director of Product Marketing to build and lead Aurigo's product marketing function. This is a foundational hire, you will be the first dedicated product marketing leader at Aurigo, responsible for building the team, establishing the function, and owning the narrative that connects our products to the buyers who need them. You will work directly with the broader leadership team to develop and own the positioning, messaging, and go-to-market strategy across all of Aurigo's products and buyer segments, government agencies, commercial capital owners, and the AI platform story that cuts across both. This role reports to the VP of Products and is a direct input to the company's revenue growth and competitive positioning.

  

**Roles and Responsibilities**

*   Own Aurigo's product marketing strategy across all products and buyer segments, government, commercial, and AI platform, ensuring a coherent, differentiated, and commercially grounded narrative in the market.
*   Build and lead the product marketing team across buyer segments and functions. Recruit, develop, and hold the quality bar for the team you build.
*   Define and own the company's overall positioning and messaging framework, the foundational document that all downstream content, sales plays, and go-to-market programs are built on.
*   Partner with the AI platform team to develop the AI platform narrative, translating the technical depth of the foundation model and agent framework into buyer-facing value propositions that resonate with capital program owners.
*   Work closely with the product management team to stay current on product strategy, roadmap, and differentiation, and to ensure that messaging reflects what is being built and shipped.
*   Own product launch readiness across all products and segments, coordinating the product marketing team, enabling the sales team, and ensuring every launch has a complete go-to-market plan before it goes live.
*   Build and maintain the competitive intelligence program, including oversight of battlecards, win-loss analysis, and competitive positioning across all segments.
*   Partner with the sales leadership team to ensure sellers have the messaging, tools, and segment-specific content they need to win. Own the feedback loop from the field back to the product marketing team.
*   Own the product enablement function in partnership with the enablement team, ensuring channel partners, co-sell partners, and internal sellers are equipped with the content and tools they need to close.
*   Represent product marketing in leadership reviews and customer advisory engagements where the company narrative and competitive positioning are on the table.

  

**Soft Skills**

*   Exceptional strategic storytelling. Can distill complex product and platform capabilities into buyer narratives that are credible, differentiated, and commercially compelling.
*   Strong leadership presence. Can earn credibility with senior leadership, the sales team, and enterprise customers, and develop a product marketing team that produces work of consistently high quality.
*   Excellent written and verbal communication. Sets the standard for clarity, precision, and impact across all content the team produces.
*   Deeply collaborative. Works effectively across product, sales, customer success, and executive leadership without creating friction or ownership confusion.
*   Comfortable operating in ambiguity and building from scratch. This is a function being built, not inherited.

  

**Hard Skills**

*   Proven track record of building or significantly scaling a product marketing function in a B2B SaaS or enterprise software company.
*   Deep experience developing positioning and messaging frameworks for complex enterprise products sold into multiple buyer segments.
*   Experience leading product launches end to end, from strategy and positioning through sales enablement and field execution.
*   Strong command of competitive intelligence practices, win-loss analysis, battlecard development, and competitive positioning at scale.
*   Experience managing and developing a team of product marketers across different verticals or buyer segments.

  

**Educational Qualifications**

Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field. MBA from a top institution strongly preferred.

  

**Prior Experience**

*   12 or more years of experience in product marketing, with at least 3 to 4 years in a senior leadership role in B2B SaaS or enterprise software.
*   Proven experience building or leading a product marketing team, not just contributing to one.
*   Demonstrated track record of owning company-level positioning and messaging that directly contributed to revenue outcomes.
*   Experience in enterprise software for government, infrastructure, construction, or capital-intensive commercial markets is a strong advantage.
*   Exposure to North American markets and enterprise sales cycles is strongly preferred.

  

**Technical Skills**

*   Familiarity with enterprise SaaS product portfolio structures, pricing and packaging concepts, and platform-level go-to-market motions.
*   Ability to develop fluency in AI platform narratives and translate technical AI capabilities into buyer-facing value propositions.
*   Proficiency with sales enablement platforms, content management systems, and CRM tools.
*   Comfort using AI tools to accelerate content production, competitive research, and messaging iteration at scale.
*   Understanding of account-based marketing, partner co-sell motions, and SI channel enablement as go-to-market levers.

  

**About Aurigo**

Aurigo is an AI‑native capital program management platform trusted by over 300 customers managing more than $300 billion in capital programs across North America. With over 40,000 projects delivered, Aurigo helps organisations in transportation, water and utilities, healthcare, higher education, and government plan, build, and manage infrastructure with confidence. Recognised as one of the _Top 25 AI Companies of 2024_ and a _Great Place to Work_ for three consecutive years, we leverage artificial intelligence to create smarter, more connected outcomes. At Aurigo, we don’t just build software—we help shape the future of infrastructure.

title: Director of Marketing & Communications
description:
**Additional Information  
  
****Job Number**26060666  
  
**Job Category**Sales & Marketing  
  
**Location**W Goa, Vagator Beach, Bardez, Goa, Goa, India, 403509 VIEW ON MAP  
  
**Schedule**Full Time  
  
**Located Remotely?**N  
  
**Position Type** Management  
  
**Job Summary  
  
**The Director of Marketing Communications is responsible for the planning, direction, control, and coordination of all communication activities, with an emphasis on public relations. Promotes and maintains good communications in order to enhance the prestigious image of the hotel and by doing so contributes to the revenues of the hotel.  
  
**CANDIDATE PROFILE  
  
****Education And Experience  
  
****Required:  
  
**

*   High school diploma or GED; 4 years experience in the sales and marketing, guest services, front desk, or related professional area.  
      
    

OR  
  

*   2-year degree from an accredited university in Business Administration, Marketing, Hotel and Restaurant Management, or related major; 2 years experience in the sales and marketing or related professional area.  
      
    

**CORE WORK ACTIVITIES  
  
****Managing Marketing Communications Activities  
  
**

*   Develops an annual communications plan with specific goals and budgets as outlined in the hotel's marketing plan/communications manual. Prepares working plans to achieve goals and ensures the communications team is fully briefed on goals and progress.
*   Compares actual achievements against goals on a regular basis and takes corrective action.
*   Assists the DOM in the planning of all mailing activities, and oversees their execution.
*   Ensures that the corporate ID manual is kept up-to-date and implemented as appropriate.
*   Prepares on a timely basis the monthly sales & marketing “communications” report.
*   Supervises and directs photography for advertising, collateral and public relations purposes in liaison with the DOM, the advertising agency and the field marketing department at corporate office.
*   Ensures the department has a comprehensive master slide/photo/CD library for all advertising, collateral and public relations activities, and regularly sends these to corporate office for the image library.
*   Supervises operations of the in-house art department.
*   Monitors activities of competitor hotels and trends within the industry.  
      
    

**Managing Public Relations Activities  
  
**

*   Acts as official spokesperson for the hotel when appropriate and responds to all media requests within 24 hours.
*   Compiles and maintains a comprehensive list of media contacts and manages them as per the media account management system. Delegates assigned accounts to communications staff as appropriate but takes full responsibility for the key media by maintaining and developing close relationships
*   Prepares press releases for appropriate targeted media, locally, regionally and internationally.
*   Works closely with the corporate and international press offices on developing story angles.
*   Plays a key role in community and government relations as well as VIP handling.
*   Secures opportunities, directs and attends hotel sponsored events, and develops targeted partner relationships.
*   Creates and organizes press promotional activities.
*   Participates in the press events/trips organized by the regional PR offices as required.
*   Conducts press blitzes when appropriate.
*   Ensures press kit information is comprehensive and kept up-to-date.  
      
    

**Managing Advertising Activities  
  
**

*   Works with the DOM and advertising agency on the rooms and food & beverage tactical advertising campaigns' creative and media plans.
*   Maximizes advertising budget by ensuring that the hotel's creative message and media activities are consistent with the advertising of sister hotels and the company group advertising.
*   Ensures that the advertising creative is in synergy with the company, projecting a consistent and quality message.
*   Reviews the hotel's market segmentation and other appropriate marketing reports to ensure that the media scheduling matches those segments.
*   Monitors and maintains media schedules as well as prompt settlement of accounts.  
      
    

**Managing Direct Marketing Activities  
  
**

*   Takes an integrated approach to DM activities, ensuring a consistent and quality image is projected.
*   Assists the DOM in the planning, implementation and tracking of electronic marketing activities.
*   Maintains budget control.  
      
    

**Manages Collateral  
  
**

*   Coordinates and executes production of all printed materials, with assistance of advertising agencies, following the specifications stipulated in the corporate ID manual.
*   Ensures hotel information is updated regularly on the internet/intranet.
*   Supervises the production and quality of all displays and temporary signage in hotel public areas.
*   Supervises and budgets for quality gift items as appropriate. Ensures correct usage of hotel logo on gift items as stipulated in corporate ID manual.
*   Supervises the in-house graphic designer and/or print shop.  
      
    

_At Marriott International, we are dedicated to being an equal opportunity employer, welcoming all and providing access to opportunity. We actively foster an environment where the unique backgrounds of our associates are valued and celebrated. Our greatest strength lies in the rich blend of culture, talent, and experiences of our associates. We are committed to non-discrimination on any protected basis, including disability, veteran status, or other basis protected by applicable law.

title: Head of Marketing
companyName: Ridhira Group - Building World's largest Wellness Communities
description:
Marketing Head – Hospitality & Wellness

for Ridhira Group

Ridhira Group is a wellness-led real estate, hospitality, and lifestyle company focused on creating integrated wellness communities, luxury wellness resorts, retreats, and hospitality experiences. The group operates across wellness real estate, spa & wellness services, resort living, and experiential hospitality.

  

**Marketing Head – Hospitality & Wellness**

Location:Hyderabad / Ridhira Hospitality Projects

Industry Preference:Luxury Hospitality / Resorts / Wellness Hospitality / Lifestyle Brands

Experience Required: 12–18+ years in hospitality marketing, resort marketing, luxury hotel branding, wellness hospitality, or experiential lifestyle marketing.

  

Role Overview

We are looking for a dynamic and strategic Marketing Head from the hospitality industry to lead brand positioning, integrated marketing, digital growth, experiential campaigns, and revenue-driven marketing initiatives for Ridhira Group’s hospitality and wellness verticals.

The ideal candidate should have strong experience in luxury resorts, destination marketing, wellness hospitality, experiential events, premium memberships, and high-end customer engagement. The role requires building a strong hospitality brand ecosystem that drives occupancy, wellness experiences, F&B visibility, weddings/events, memberships, and luxury lifestyle positioning.

This role will work closely with leadership, sales, operations, digital, events, and partnerships teams to establish Ridhira as a leading wellness hospitality and resort brand in India.

  

Key Responsibilities

Brand & Hospitality Marketing Strategy

*   Develop and execute integrated marketing strategies for hospitality, retreats, wellness resorts, and experiential destinations.
*   Build premium brand positioning for wellness-led hospitality experiences.
*   Lead resort branding, storytelling, customer engagement, and campaign planning.
*   Drive awareness for luxury wellness experiences, staycations, retreats, spa experiences, and destination events.

Digital & Performance Marketing

*   Lead digital marketing across Meta, Google, YouTube, LinkedIn, and luxury lifestyle platforms.
*   Drive performance campaigns focused on occupancy, bookings, leads, memberships, weddings, and events.
*   Optimize customer acquisition cost (CAC), ROI, and campaign performance.
*   Build high-impact content funnels for luxury and wellness audiences.

Hospitality Revenue Marketing

*   Collaborate with sales and reservations teams to improve occupancy and revenue generation.
*   Plan seasonal campaigns, festive campaigns, wellness retreats, and experiential packages.
*   Develop strategies for weddings, banquets, MICE, corporate retreats, and luxury events.
*   Support hospitality revenue management through demand generation initiatives.

Branding & Content

*   Oversee content strategy including photography, films, influencer collaborations, PR, and social storytelling.
*   Lead brand communication aligned with wellness, sustainability, luxury, and nature-centric living.
*   Build premium campaigns for resorts, wellness centers, retreats, and experiential communities.

Partnerships & Influencer Collaborations

*   Build partnerships with luxury brands, wellness experts, fitness brands, celebrities, travel influencers, and hospitality platforms.
*   Develop strategic collaborations to enhance brand visibility and experiential engagement.
*   Manage hospitality PR agencies and media relationships.

Customer Experience & Community Engagement

*   Create loyalty and membership engagement programs.
*   Develop community-based marketing initiatives aligned with wellness living and experiential hospitality.
*   Enhance guest engagement and retention strategies.

Leadership & Team Management

*   Lead internal marketing, creative, digital, branding, and agency teams.
*   Build KPIs, performance dashboards, and campaign tracking systems.
*   Drive innovation, creativity, and data-driven decision-making across the marketing function.

Desired Candidate Profile

*   MBA in Marketing / Hospitality Management preferred.
*   Strong experience in luxury hotels, wellness resorts, hospitality brands, or lifestyle hospitality.
*   Proven expertise in hospitality digital marketing and brand building.
*   Experience handling high-budget branding and performance campaigns.
*   Strong understanding of luxury customer behavior and experiential marketing.
*   Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
*   Experience working with hospitality CRMs, booking platforms, and digital analytics tools.
*   Exposure to wellness, spa, luxury real estate hospitality, or retreat marketing is highly preferred.

  

Preferred Background From

*   Luxury Hotels & Resorts
*   Wellness Resorts
*   Hospitality Groups
*   Lifestyle Hospitality Brands
*   Destination Wedding & Event Hospitality
*   Premium Travel & Leisure Brands

  

Key Skills

Hospitality Marketing | Resort Marketing | Luxury Branding | Digital Marketing | Revenue Marketing | Wellness Hospitality | Experiential Marketing | Brand Strategy | Campaign Management | Social Media | Influencer Marketing | PR & Media | Event Marketing | Customer Experience | Hospitality Sales Support | Team Leadership

  

Apply Now:

📧 Email: anusha@ridhira.com

📱 WhatsApp CV: +91 7386688223

title: Director of Organic Growth
description:
****About Us  
****QuillBot was founded in 2017 with a mission to help students and professionals strengthen their writing. Today, we help over 56 million people around the world create great things. Whether you're writing, designing, coding, or collaborating, QuillBot is a place where anyone can create at the speed of thought. Our AI-powered tools help you think clearly, communicate effectively, and create beautifully—across every platform, in any format, at any skill level. If you're passionate about using technology to make the path from inspiration to execution more accessible, intentional, and relevant, come join us.

**Role Overview  
**We are looking for a strategic, high-ownership Director of Organic Growth to lead and scale QuillBot’s organic acquisition engine across all major discovery surfaces. This role goes well beyond traditional SEO—you will own the full spectrum of organic growth, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), App Store Optimization (ASO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Extension Store visibility (Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, and others). As a Director, you will set the vision, build and manage the roadmap, and lead the existing SEO & Organic Growth team. You’ll partner closely with Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, and International teams to embed organic growth into QuillBot’s product and go-to-market strategy. Your work will directly influence organic traffic, sales, install volume, revenue, and brand visibility on a global scale.

**Responsibilities**

*   **Strategy & Leadership**
    *   **Organic Growth Strategy**: Define and own the overarching organic growth strategy spanning SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Store optimization. Set quarterly and annual OKRs tied to impressions, clicks, MAU, installs, and sales. 
    *   **Team Leadership**: Manage, mentor, and develop the SEO & Organic Growth team. Foster a culture of experimentation, accountability, and continuous learning. Identify and hire for key capability gaps as needed.
    *   **Roadmap Ownership**: Build and maintain a prioritized organic growth roadmap. Balance quick wins with longer-term strategic bets. Present plans and progress to senior leadership, including the CEO.
    *   **Cross-Functional Partnership**: Serve as the organic growth voice in cross-functional planning with AI, Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, Marketing Operations, and International Expansion teams. Ensure organic considerations are embedded in product launches, site architecture decisions, and content strategy.
    *   **Product Roadmap Influence**: Act as a key influencer of the Product roadmap by surfacing organic growth opportunities, user intent data, and search landscape insights that shape feature prioritization, new product bets, and go-to-market timing.
*   **Search Engine Optimization (SEO)  
    **
    *   **SEO Program Ownership**: Own end-to-end SEO performance across QuillBot’s web properties. Drive strategy across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO to secure and defend top positions for high-value keywords.
    *   **Technical SEO**: Lead technical audits and partner with Engineering to resolve crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, site speed, structured data, and mobile-responsiveness issues at scale.
    *   **Content & Keyword Strategy**: Oversee keyword research, content gap analysis, and on-page optimization. Collaborate with the Content team to ensure every page is strategically targeted and continuously improved.
    *   **Link Building & Authority**: Direct link-building and digital PR strategies to grow domain authority. Evaluate backlink quality and build partnerships with authoritative sites.
    *   **Algorithm Resilience**: Monitor Google algorithm updates, diagnose ranking fluctuations, and quickly adapt strategies to protect and grow organic traffic.
*   **Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)**
    *   **GEO Strategy**: Develop and execute a strategy to maximize QuillBot’s visibility in AI-generated answers and citations across generative search experiences (e.g., Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, etc).
    *   **Content for LLMs**: Work with Content and Product to structure information, schema markup, and authoritative content so that generative engines accurately surface and recommend QuillBot.
    *   **Measurement & Experimentation**: Define GEO-specific metrics, build tracking frameworks, and run experiments to understand how generative surfaces drive traffic and conversions.
    *   **Competitive Intelligence**: Monitor how competitors are cited in generative answers and identify opportunities to increase QuillBot’s share of voice.
*   **App Store Optimisation (ASO)**
    *   **ASO Program Ownership**: Own QuillBot’s organic discoverability and conversion rates in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
    *   **Listing Optimization:** Optimize app titles, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and preview videos to improve search rankings and download conversion rates.
    *   **Ratings & Reviews**: Develop strategies to increase the volume and quality of positive ratings and reviews, and work with Product to address recurring user feedback themes.
    *   **A/B Testing**: Design and run store listing experiments to continuously improve conversion. Leverage tools like Google Play Experiments and third-party ASO platforms.
    *   **Market-Specific ASO**: Partner with the International Expansion team to localize and optimize listings for priority markets.
*   **Extension Store Optimisation**
    *   **Extension Visibility**: Own QuillBot’s presence and discoverability in the Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, Microsoft Edge Add-ons, and Firefox Add-ons.
    *   **Listing & CRO**: Optimize extension titles, descriptions, screenshots, and feature graphics. Improve install conversion rates through iterative testing.
    *   **Ratings & Review Strategy**: Drive rating volume and quality for extensions. Coordinate with Product and Support to address negative feedback and reduce churn.
    *   **Cross-Channel Synergy**: Align extension store strategy with SEO and ASO efforts to create a unified organic discovery experience across web, app, and extension surfaces.
*   **Analytics, Reporting & Insights**
    *   **Performance Measurement**: Build and maintain dashboards tracking organic performance across all channels (SEO, ASO, GEO, Extension Stores). Define KPIs and ensure the team is data-driven in decision-making.
    *   **Executive Reporting**: Deliver regular performance updates and strategic insights to senior leadership. Translate complex organic data into clear narratives with actionable recommendations.
    *   **Tool Stack**: Evaluate and manage the organic growth tool stack (e.g., Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Sensor Tower, Screaming Frog, etc).

**Qualifications**

*   8–10 years of progressive experience in SEO and/or organic growth, with at least 3 years in a people-management role.
*   Global experience: demonstrated ability to drive organic growth across multiple markets, regions, and languages—not limited to English-speaking audiences.
*   Demonstrated success managing organic growth for a high-traffic website (+20M monthly active users) and a consumer app with significant install volume.
*   Proven track record of securing and defending #1 positions for competitive keywords
*   Proven ability to build organic visibility from zero for new product launches in highly competitive markets — taking a product from no search presence to top-ranking positions against established incumbents.
*   Deep expertise across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO, with a strong grasp of how search engines crawl, index, and rank content.
*   Hands-on experience with ASO for iOS and/or Android apps, including keyword optimization, listing experiments, and review management.
*   Strong understanding of the generative AI search landscape and emerging GEO best practices.
*   Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and at least one ASO platform (preferably Sensor Tower).
*   Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and comfort with basic HTML/CSS.
*   Excellent communicator who can present data-driven strategies to senior leadership, including C-level stakeholders.
*   Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.

**Bonus Points**

*   Experience at a SaaS, EdTech, or consumer-tech company with a freemium or subscription business model.
*   Hands-on experience with multilingual and multi-regional SEO and ASO strategies.
*   Familiarity with structured data, schema markup, and Knowledge Graph optimization.
*   Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale page generation strategies.
*   Experience optimizing browser extension listings in the Chrome Web Store or equivalent platforms.
*   Background in conversion rate optimization (CRO) as it relates to organic landing pages and store listings.
*   Comfortable working across time zones in a fully remote, globally distributed team.

**Why Join QuillBot?**

*   **Ownership & Impact**: Take full ownership of organic growth across every discovery surface and directly influence QuillBot’s trajectory.
*   **Scope & Challenge**: Lead a function that spans SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Stores—a rare opportunity to shape organic strategy holistically.
*   **Collaborative Culture**: Work with a passionate, innovative team across Content, Marketing, Product, and Engineering.
*   **Remote Flexibility**: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely with flexible hours to balance professional and personal life.
*   **Professional Growth**: QuillBot values learning and development, offering opportunities for skill enhancement and career advancement.

**Benefits & Perks**

*   Competitive salary and annual bonus
*   Medical coverage
*   Life and accidental insurance
*   Vacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)
*   Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshops
*   Maternity & parental leave
*   Hybrid & remote model with flexible working hours
*   On-site & remote company events throughout the year
*   Tech & WFH stipends & new hire allowances
*   Employee referral program
*   Premium access to QuillBot

\*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process. 

Research shows that candidates from underrepresented backgrounds often don't apply for roles if they don't meet all the criteria. We strongly encourage you to apply if you're interested: we'd love to learn how you can amplify our team with your unique experience!  
  
This role is eligible for hire in India.  
  
We are a virtual-first company with employees across the United States, Canada, India, Germany, and the Netherlands. Our compensation approach is market-based and varies by location while ensuring fairness, consistency, and transparency.

The base pay for this role is determined by several factors, including:

*   Relevant professional experience
*   Skills and expertise
*   Scope and responsibilities of the role
*   Internal equity considerations 

In addition to base salary, total compensation may include bonus, equity, and benefits. Eligibility depends on role, level, and location.

We are committed to equal pay for equal work, and all compensation decisions are made using consistent, gender-neutral criteria in alignment with pay transparency requirements  
  
#QuillBot  
  

**Equal ​Employment Opportunity Statement ​(EEO)  
**We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity and ​inclusion within our company.  ​We will consider all qualified applicants without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, gender ​identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, marital status, ​veteran status, or ​ability status. We will ensure that individuals who are differently abled are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment as provided to other applicants or employees. Please contact us to request accommodation.

*   Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and at least one ASO platform (preferably Sensor Tower).
*   Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and comfort with basic HTML/CSS.
*   Excellent communicator who can present data-driven strategies to senior leadership, including C-level stakeholders.
*   Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.

**Bonus Points**

*   Experience at a SaaS, EdTech, or consumer-tech company with a freemium or subscription business model.
*   Hands-on experience with multilingual and multi-regional SEO and ASO strategies.
*   Familiarity with structured data, schema markup, and Knowledge Graph optimization.
*   Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale page generation strategies.
*   Experience optimizing browser extension listings in the Chrome Web Store or equivalent platforms.
*   Background in conversion rate optimization (CRO) as it relates to organic landing pages and store listings.
*   Comfortable working across time zones in a fully remote, globally distributed team.

**Why Join QuillBot?**

*   **Ownership & Impact**: Take full ownership of organic growth across every discovery surface and directly influence QuillBot’s trajectory.
*   **Scope & Challenge**: Lead a function that spans SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Stores—a rare opportunity to shape organic strategy holistically.
*   **Collaborative Culture**: Work with a passionate, innovative team across Content, Marketing, Product, and Engineering.
*   **Remote Flexibility**: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely with flexible hours to balance professional and personal life.
*   **Professional Growth**: QuillBot values learning and development, offering opportunities for skill enhancement and career advancement.

**Benefits & Perks**

*   Competitive salary and annual bonus
*   Medical coverage
*   Life and accidental insurance
*   Vacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)
*   Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshops
*   Maternity & parental leave
*   Hybrid & remote model with flexible working hours
*   On-site & remote company events throughout the year
*   Tech & WFH stipends & new hire allowances
*   Employee referral program
*   Premium access to QuillBot

\*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process.

title: Director, Marketing Website
description:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Director, Marketing Website in India.  
  
**This is a senior technical leadership role responsible for owning and evolving high-impact, global marketing websites that serve diverse audiences across multiple regions and languages. You will oversee both the technical architecture and performance of complex web platforms, ensuring optimal user experience, speed, and conversion outcomes. The role combines hands-on technical expertise with strategic leadership, requiring close collaboration with marketing, product, analytics, and compliance teams. You will lead a small development team while driving experimentation, SEO performance, and continuous website optimization. The environment is highly autonomous and fast-paced, with a strong emphasis on ownership, innovation, and data-driven decision-making. This position is ideal for a leader who can balance coding depth, architectural thinking, and cross-functional influence in a global digital ecosystem.  
  
**Accountabilities  
  
**In this role, you will own the end-to-end performance, architecture, and evolution of global marketing websites, ensuring they deliver strong user experience, high conversion rates, and technical excellence. You will lead a small development team while setting standards, driving execution, and aligning stakeholders around a unified website strategy.  
  

*   Own the technical architecture, performance, and reliability of global marketing websites and CMS platforms
*   Lead and mentor a small development team, defining standards, delivery processes, and growth plans
*   Manage codebases, enforce best practices in version control, code reviews, and release processes
*   Drive Core Web Vitals improvements, ensuring high performance across mobile and desktop
*   Own technical SEO strategy, including crawlability, indexing, schema, international SEO, and site speed
*   Design and execute A/B testing programs using experimentation tools and data insights
*   Collaborate with analytics teams to define user research and funnel optimization strategies
*   Build and maintain user journeys for multiple ICPs across different regions and languages
*   Coordinate cross-functionally with marketing, product, sales, and legal stakeholders
*   Oversee compliance with accessibility (WCAG) and data privacy regulations (GDPR)  
      
    

**Requirements  
  
**This role requires deep technical expertise in modern web development combined with strong leadership and cross-functional communication skills. The ideal candidate is both hands-on and strategic, capable of owning complex systems while driving marketing performance outcomes.  
  

*   7+ years of experience in web development, digital marketing technology, or related fields, including leadership experience
*   Strong hands-on experience with modern web frameworks such as React, Next.js, Astro, or similar
*   Experience with headless CMS platforms such as Strapi, Contentful, or equivalent
*   Proven expertise in technical SEO, including Core Web Vitals, schema markup, and international SEO
*   Experience running structured A/B testing and experimentation programs (e.g., PostHog, Optimizely, VWO)
*   Strong knowledge of analytics tools such as GA4, Google Search Console, and Tag Manager
*   Experience with CI/CD pipelines, release management, and cloud environments (e.g., AWS)
*   Understanding of accessibility standards (WCAG) and GDPR compliance requirements
*   Strong stakeholder management skills with ability to communicate across technical and executive audiences
*   Passion for AI-driven development tools and modern web optimization practices
*   Ability to prioritize, manage complexity, and operate independently in a high-ownership environment  
      
    

**Nice To Have  
  
**

*   Experience with AI-assisted development tools (Cursor, Copilot, Lovable, etc.)
*   Experience managing multi-language or multi-region websites
*   Familiarity with CRM or marketing automation systems such as Salesforce  
      
    

**Benefits  
  
**

*   Fully remote and flexible work model (“Work in Any Way” philosophy)
*   Global and multicultural work environment
*   Annual performance bonus or incentive program eligibility
*   Paid bonding leave for new parents
*   Two paid charitable days per year
*   Access to coworking spaces depending on location
*   Learning and development platforms for continuous upskilling
*   Strong emphasis on autonomy, ownership, and flexible scheduling
*   Inclusive culture focused on recognition and collaboration  
      
    

**How Jobgether Works  
  
**We use an **AI-powered matching process** to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.  
  
We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!  
  
Why Apply Through Jobgether?  
  
**Data Privacy Notice:** By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.  
  
We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Director Marketing Communications
description:
**About the Company**

Raffles Udaipur opened in 2021, its ornamental gardens, tumbling fountains and stately Indo-Saracenic architecture describing a love story between India and the West. Set on a 21-acre private island rich with birdlife and exotic flora and fauna, this contemporary reimagining of a country mansion is the first Raffles hotel in India.

  

**About the Role**

We're looking for an accomplished Director of Marketing & Communication to lead our marketing and communications initiatives in Udaipur, India. In this strategic leadership role, you will oversee the development and execution of comprehensive marketing strategies, manage brand positioning, and drive organizational communication efforts.

  

**Responsibilities**

  

*   Develop and execute strategic marketing plans that align with organizational objectives and drive revenue growth
*   Lead, mentor, and manage a diverse marketing and communications team, fostering a collaborative and innovative work environment
*   Oversee brand strategy, positioning, and management across all channels to ensure consistent messaging and market presence
*   Design and implement multi-channel marketing campaigns, including digital, social media, content, and traditional marketing initiatives
*   Analyze marketing performance metrics and ROI to optimize campaigns and inform data-driven decision-making
*   Manage marketing budgets and allocate resources effectively to maximize campaign impact and organizational efficiency
*   Develop and execute corporate communication strategies, including internal communications, public relations, and stakeholder engagement
*   Build and maintain relationships with external partners, media outlets, and key stakeholders to enhance organizational reputation
*   Customize marketing programs to address market trends, competitive landscape, and evolving customer needs
*   Lead crisis communication management and develop protocols to protect organizational reputation during challenging situations
*   Collaborate with cross-functional teams including sales, product, and operations to ensure marketing alignment with business goals
*   Stay current with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices in marketing and communications

  

**Qualifications**

  

*   8+ years of progressive experience in marketing and communications roles, with at least 3 years in a director-level or equivalent leadership position
*   Proven expertise in developing and executing strategic marketing plans and multi-channel marketing campaigns
*   Strong background in brand management, positioning, and corporate communications strategy

  

**Required Skills**

  

*   Demonstrated experience leading, building, and managing high-performing marketing teams
*   Advanced proficiency in marketing analytics, data interpretation, and ROI analysis
*   Solid understanding of digital marketing, including social media marketing, SEO/SEM, and marketing automation platforms
*   Experience with budget management, financial planning, and resource allocation
*   Excellent written and verbal communication skills with the ability to articulate complex ideas clearly
*   Proficiency in CRM platforms and marketing technology tools
*   Experience in crisis communication and reputation management
*   Knowledge of market research methodologies and competitive analysis

  

**Pay range and compensation package**

An opportunity to be with world’s preferred hospitality company. Captivating and rewarding experience working alongside passionate professionals. Range of exclusive Heartist Benefits. Develop your talent through learning programs by Academy Accor.

  

**Equal Opportunity Statement**

We are committed to diversity and inclusivity.

title: Associate Director - Flights Marketing (Bangkok-based, relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda  
  
**At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.  
  
Today, we are part of Booking Holdings \[NASDAQ: BKNG\], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.  
  
No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.  
  
**Associate director - Flights Marketing  
  
****Get to Know our Team:**    
  
The Performance Marketing Team of Agoda is a world leader in online marketing. This department is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers through measurable marketing programs and channels. The team is a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists, and data scientists in the world. The marketing leadership at Agoda have deep experience in data science, product, strategy, and other marketing fields and have built an organization that thrives on data, creative ideas, and technology. The Performance Marketing Team also fosters a great learning environment. You will be able to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a variety of backgrounds from all over the world.  
  
**In this role, you’ll get to:** 

*   Co-own the flights PnL with Product counterparts
*   Define the overall Marketing Strategy for Flights Vertical
*   Execute the strategy: spearhead the development, execution, and optimization for growing Agoda’s Flights business on different channels (e.g., CRM, Paid Peformance marketing, pricing)
*   Guide, coach and manage a team
*   Conduct end-to-end analysis of large, complex datasets related to channel performance, user behavior, and market trends, translating raw data into actionable insights
*   Develop hypotheses, design experiments (e.g., A/B tests), and build structured analyses to rigorously evaluate campaign effectiveness and drive data-driven decisions for channel growth
*   Partner closely with various business functions, especially Marketing Accommodation, Flights product and flights supply, to identify opportunities, analyze, and interpret trends or patterns in complex data sets using different techniques and tools such as SQL or Tableau to drive meaningful initiatives
*   Monitor and report on the effectiveness of business initiatives, providing insights and recommendations for continuous improvement.
*   Communicate complex findings, performance updates, and strategic recommendations clearly and concisely to key stakeholders, including senior management
*   Lead, mentor, and develop a team of analysts and managers; participate in hiring and onboarding new team members.  
      
    

**What you’ll need to succeed:** 

*   Extensive Experience: 10+ years in marketing analytics position or otherwise in projects involving big data - preferably in the tech, e-commerce, or digital marketing industry. Experience in articulating strategic issues and negotiating with C-level executives – experience in leading strategy consulting projects
*   Bachelor's degree in computer science/Statistics/Math or Engineering or Economics and Finance
*   Data-Driven Approach:  Strong analytical skills with the ability to analyze data, translate data into actionable insights, and generate impactful recommendations using SQL. You really need to love data for this role!
*   Strong Communication Skills:  Exceptional writing and verbal communication abilities, with proficiency in creating impactful and visually appealing presentations.
*   Stakeholder management: Ability to effectively communicate, influence and persuade with different levels of stakeholders (especially Senior Management) with proven strong commercial acumen
*   People management experience: including hiring, coaching, and developing team members
*   Entrepreneurial mindset: A proactive, entrepreneurial mindset with a strong sense of ownership and a get-thing-done attitude.  
      
    

**It’s great if you have:** 

*   Experience in digital or social media marketing
*   Experience in the online travel or e-commerce industry
*   Experience in flights industry
*   Experience in hypothesis testing frameworks, statistical analysis, and using Python/R for data manipulation and analysis.

title: Director - Marketing & Student Recruitment
description:
**Position Description**

**Position Title:** Director of Marketing & Student Recruitment

**Reports To:** Chief Operating Officer

**Employment Type:** Full-time

**Location:** UNSW Bengaluru Campus

  

**Position Summary:**

The Director of Marketing & Student Recruitment leads the UNSW Bengaluru marketing and student recruitment strategy and operations, operating within UNSW’s global brand and governance framework. The role is accountable for enforcing brand quality standards, delivering local market growth, managing end-to-end student recruitment performance, and ensuring all activity in-market is coordinated with UNSW Sydney to present a unified brand and student experience.

  

This role blends strategic marketing leadership with hands-on student recruitment channel management, brand stewardship, and stakeholder engagement to attract high-quality students and meet undergraduate and postgraduate enrolment targets. The leader owns the full recruitment lifecycle — from integrated campaign development and partner management to outreach programs and pipeline conversion — while ensuring alignment with UNSW’s institutional brand, strategic priorities, and compliance frameworks.

  

Accountable for leading strategies that deliver enrolment growth and financial outcomes, while navigating brand governance, risk management, and regulatory compliance within India’s higher education context, the role leads the campus-wide marketing and student recruitment function to support enrolment objectives, brand reputation, and stakeholder trust. The position partners closely with UNSW Sydney and collaborates with local academic and professional leaders to deliver market impact across priority regions and segments.

  

**Accountabilities**

Strategy, Planning & Governance

*   Own the multi-year UNSW Bengaluru marketing and student recruitment strategy and annual operating plan, delivering UNSW Bengaluru outcomes and aligned to UNSW’s Marketing & Digital Experience (M&DX) strategy, global priorities, with appropriate localization to account for the local market context.
*   Lead integrated campaign planning across paid, owned, shared and earned channels with undergraduate and postgraduate marketing and recruitment funnels mapped to awareness, consideration, application, offer, and enrolment stages.
*   Analyse market trends, competitor activity, and student data to inform evidence-based strategies, forecasting, and pipeline targets.
*   Maintain collaborative planning rhythms with UNSW Sydney M&DX and Student Recruitment teams to ensure cross-campus alignment.
*   Establish and operationalize local governance aligned to UNSW Sydney guiding principles and playbooks, including marketing policies, brand standards, approval workflows, and compliance controls, covering integrity of marketing claims, consent management, and data privacy, and partner compliance and management
*   Ensure all use of the UNSW brand in India complies with the Brand Licensing Agreement, including monitoring, reporting, and escalation of any misuse or risk.
*   Ensure compliance with Indian advertising standards, sector guidelines, and data protection requirements, maintaining audit-ready documentation.

  

**Marketing & Brand**

*   Lead integrated undergraduate and postgraduate campaign planning across paid, owned, shared, and earned channels, mapped across the full recruitment funnel.
*   Direct media planning and buying (search, social, video, display, OOH, portals) with clear objectives, benchmarks, brand safety controls, and compliance with UNSW procurement requirements.
*   Oversee digital marketing initiatives including SEM, social media, content marketing, email campaigns, SEO, and analytics.
*   Steward brand architecture and identity usage in India, including program naming conventions, co-branding, and protection against misuse, consistent with UNSW Sydney brand governance requirements.
*   Oversee content operations including editorial calendars, creative production, localisation, asset management, accessibility, and speed-to-market, ensuring brand safety and authenticity standards.
*   Coordinate local public relations activities in collaboration with UNSW Sydney Corporate Communications, M&DX teams, and retained agencies, including spokesperson preparation, media engagement, and crisis communications protocols.

  

**Recruitment, Outreach & Partnerships**

*   Lead future student outreach strategy and planning, including market mapping across schools, counsellors, pathway providers, industry bodies, and regional partners.
*   Manage partner governance, training, performance, and compliance with UNSW brand and regulatory requirements.
*   Represent UNSW Bengaluru at fairs, expos, school visits, open days, campus tours, webinars, and industry events, domestically and internationally.
*   Supervise enquiry management, lead nurturing, and conversion activities across the student journey.
*   Engage with regulators, industry partners, and community groups to strengthen institutional presence and reputation.

  

**Data, Performance & Reporting**

*   Track and manage recruitment pipelines using CRM and reporting tools across leads, applications, offers, acceptances, and commencements.
*   Partner with digital, CRM, and analytics teams to optimise conversion funnels and improve the student experience.
*   Provide regular dashboards, forecasts, ROI analysis, and strategic insights to senior leadership.
*   Evaluate campaign, channel, and partner performance and reallocate investment based on outcomes and risk.

  

**Leadership, Operations & Financial Management**

*   Lead the marketing and recruitment organisation structure spanning brand, content, digital, PR, outreach, events, analytics, and partnerships.
*   Recruit, onboard, mentor, and develop high-performing teams aligned to defined capability frameworks.
*   Foster a customer-focused, results-driven culture.
*   Own budget management, investment cases, and reallocation based on ROI and risk, aligning with budget stewardship and reporting standards applicable to UNSW Sydney.
*   Vendor management: RFPs, SOWs, SLAs, and performance reviews invoice reconciliation, and risk registers; in alignment with the UNSW Sydney M&DX Playbooks and with UNSW financial and delegation frameworks.
*   Collaborate cross-functionally with Academic Units, Admissions, Student Services, Facilities, Finance, Legal, and Compliance teams.

  

**Skills & Experience:**

  

**Qualifications**

*   Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field (required).
*   Master’s or postgraduate qualification in Marketing, Business, or Higher Education (preferred).

  

**Experience**

*   12+ years’ experience in senior marketing and/or student recruitment roles.
*   Demonstrated success delivering enrolment growth or sales targets in education or related sectors.
*   Experience leading multi-channel marketing, performance marketing, and student recruitment operations.
*   Proven capability working within global brand governance frameworks and matrixed organisations.

  

**Skills & Capabilities**

*   Strategic marketing and recruitment leadership with strong commercial and financial acumen.
*   Deep understanding of India’s higher education and youth market, recruitment channels, and partner ecosystems.
*   Data-driven decision-making with confidence managing and presenting complex insights to executive audiences.
*   Advanced leadership maturity and proven team performance management experience
*   Strong stakeholder engagement, influencing, and negotiation skills.
*   High cultural intelligence and ability to localise global strategy.
*   Exceptional written, verbal, and public communication skills.
*   Willingness and ability to travel across India and internationally as required.

  

**Key Relationships**

*   Chief Operating Officer, Rector, Academic Deans and Program Heads
*   Admissions, Student Services, and Professional Staff
*   UNSW Sydney Marketing & Digital Experience and Corporate Communications
*   Finance, Legal, and Compliance teams
*   Agency partners (media, PR, creative) and external vendors
*   Schools, counsellors, pathway partners, industry bodies, and regulators

  

Emeritus is committed to teaching the skills of the future by making high-quality education accessible and affordable to individuals, companies, and governments around the world. It does this by collaborating with more than 65 top-tier universities across the United States, Europe, Latin America, Southeast Asia, India and China. Emeritus’ short courses, degree programs, professional certificates, and senior executive programs help individuals learn new skills and transform their lives, companies and organizations. Its unique model of state-of-the-art technology, curriculum innovation, and hands-on instruction from senior faculty, mentors and coaches has educated more than 250,000 individuals across 80+ countries.

  

Founded in 2015, Emeritus, part of Eruditus Group, has more than 2,000 employees globally and offices in Mumbai, New Delhi, Shanghai, Singapore, Palo Alto, Mexico City, New York, Boston, London, and Dubai. Following its $650 million Series E funding round in August 2021, the Company is valued at $3.2 billion, and is backed by Accel, SoftBank Vision Fund 2, the Chan Zuckerberg Initiative, Leeds Illuminate, Prosus Ventures, Sequoia Capital India, and Bertelsmann

title: Brand Strategist & Creative Director
description:
**Job Description: Brand Strategist & Creative Director**

**Experience**

15+ years of overall experience in brand strategy, creative leadership, and integrated marketing for B2C & B2B / technology-driven organizations

  

**Role Overview**

We are seeking a Brand Strategist & Creative Director to own and elevate our brand presence across all digital and marketing touchpoints. This is a highly hands-on leadership role responsible for defining brand strategy, directing creative execution, driving demand generation, and aligning marketing operations with business goals.

The ideal candidate will combine strategic thinking, creative excellence, and operational rigor, with deep experience in technology-led branding, **AI-driven marketing, and automation-led growth in the US market**.

**A core expectation of this role is the ability to leverage AI/LLMs and automation to deliver measurable improvements in marketing efficiency, campaign velocity, and pipeline impact.**

Candidates with prior experience in the US market across **transportation, tourism, hospitality, or tour operations domains will be given a strong preference.**

  

**Key Responsibilities**

**1\. Brand Strategy & Positioning**

*   Define, evolve, and own the company’s brand strategy, brand architecture, messaging framework, and visual identity
*   Ensure consistent brand voice and storytelling across all channels including website, campaigns, content, and sales assets
*   Lead brand research, competitive positioning, and market insights for B2B technology audiences

  

**2\. Creative Direction & Content Leadership**

*   Act as the creative owner for all marketing outputs—campaigns, websites, videos, images, presentations, and sales enablement assets
*   Translate business objectives into high-impact creative concepts and campaign narratives
*   Lead creative production for:
*   Brand and explainer videos
*   Campaign visuals and ad creatives
*   Website UI banners, visual storytelling, and assets
*   Maintain quality, originality, and consistency across all creative deliverables

  

**3\. Digital Campaigns & Demand Generation**

*   Own end-to-end digital campaign planning and execution, from strategy to delivery in the US market
*   Drive organic and paid lead generation efforts aligned to pipeline and revenue goals
*   Plan, execute, and optimise:
*   Website organic lead generation (SEO/GEO-driven)
*   Paid media campaigns across Google, Meta, and LinkedIn
*   Collaborate closely with sales and leadership to align campaigns with GTM priorities
*   **Leverage AI and automation to improve key performance metrics, including:**
*   Reduction in Cost per Lead (CPL)
*   Improved conversion rates across funnel stages
*   Faster campaign launch and optimization cycles
*   Increased campaign scalability and efficiency

  

**4\. Website & Marketing Operations**

*   Own the company website as a primary growth engine
*   Conversion optimisation
*   Content strategy
*   SEO/GEO performance
*   Manage website updates, landing pages, and campaign integrations using WordPress
*   Lead marketing operations through HubSpot Marketing Hub, including:
*   Campaigns
*   Email workflows
*   Lead scoring and attribution
*   Reporting and dashboards
*   **Implement AI/LLM-driven workflows to:**
*   Scale content creation (blogs, landing pages, ad creatives)
*   Enable personalization and audience segmentation
*   Automate lead nurturing and lifecycle marketing
*   **Drive measurable outcomes such as:**
*   Improved website conversion rates
*   Higher MQL to SQL conversion
*   Reduced manual effort and faster turnaround time

  

**5\. Analytics & Performance Management**

*   Track and analyse campaign and website performance using:
*   Google Analytics (GA4)
*   Looker Studio
*   HubSpot analytics
*   Translate data into insights and continuous improvement actions
*   **Utilize AI-driven analytics to:**
*   Enable predictive insights and performance forecasting
*   Optimize channel spend and budget allocation
*   **Own and report on KPIs including:**
*   Marketing-attributed revenue and ROI
*   Funnel conversion metrics
*   Campaign efficiency and velocity

  

**6\. Project Delivery & Stakeholder Management**

*   Own project timelines, creative workflows, and campaign delivery from concept to launch in the US market
*   Collaborate with internal stakeholders including leadership, sales, product, and external partners
*   Ensure on-time, on-brand, and high-quality delivery across multiple concurrent initiatives

  

**Required Skills & Expertise**

**Strategic & Functional Expertise**

*   Brand strategy & brand management
*   Creative direction and visual storytelling
*   Digital campaign strategy and execution
*   Website organic lead generation
*   Paid media lead generation
*   SEO / GEO understanding and implementation
*   Marketing operations and automation
*   End-to-end project delivery
*   Stakeholder management and executive communication
*   **Mandatory: Hands-on expertise with AI tools, Large Language Models (LLMs), and AI-driven marketing workflows**
*   **Mandatory: Proven track record of using AI/automation to deliver measurable business outcomes, such as:**
*   Reduction in Cost per Lead (CPL)
*   Improved conversion rates
*   Faster campaign deployment cycles
*   Increased content production efficiency

  

**Tools & Platforms (Hands-on Experience Required)**

*   HubSpot Marketing Hub
*   HubSpot CRM
*   WordPress CMS
*   Google Ads
*   Meta Ads Manager
*   LinkedIn Campaign Manager
*   Google Analytics / GA4
*   Looker Studio
*   Canva
*   Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects – or equivalents)
*   **AI-powered tools and platforms (e.g., ChatGPT, generative AI tools, marketing automation platforms) – mandatory**

  

**Leadership Expectations**

*   Strong ownership mindset with the ability to operate both strategically and tactically
*   Mentorship of internal creative, content, and marketing team members
*   Clear communicator who can influence senior stakeholders and business leaders
*   High attention to detail with a bias toward execution and measurable outcomes
*   **Data-driven mindset with accountability for KPIs and business impact**
*   **Ability to translate AI/automation capabilities into tangible revenue and growth outcomes**

  

**Nice to Have**

*   Experience in software development, SaaS, or IT services branding
*   Experience working in high-growth or scale-up environments
*   Exposure to ABM (Account-Based Marketing) and enterprise B2B campaigns
*   Experience in the US market within **transportation, tourism, hospitality, or tour operations domains** will provide a strong competitive advantage

title: Director of Organic Growth
description:
**About Learneo  
**Learneo is a platform of builder-driven businesses, including Course Hero, CliffsNotes, LitCharts, Quillbot, Symbolab, and Scribbr, all united around a shared mission of supercharging productivity and learning for everyone. We attract and scale high growth businesses built and run by visionary entrepreneurs. Each team innovates independently but has a unique opportunity to collaborate, experiment, and grow together, and they are supported by centralized corporate operations functions, including HR, Finance and Legal.

**Role Overview  
**We are looking for a strategic, high-ownership Director of Organic Growth to lead and scale QuillBot’s organic acquisition engine across all major discovery surfaces. This role goes well beyond traditional SEO—you will own the full spectrum of organic growth, including Search Engine Optimization (SEO), App Store Optimization (ASO), Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), and Extension Store visibility (Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, and others). As a Director, you will set the vision, build and manage the roadmap, and lead the existing SEO & Organic Growth team. You’ll partner closely with Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, and International teams to embed organic growth into QuillBot’s product and go-to-market strategy. Your work will directly influence organic traffic, sales, install volume, revenue, and brand visibility on a global scale.

**Responsibilities**

*   **Strategy & Leadership**
    *   **Organic Growth Strategy**: Define and own the overarching organic growth strategy spanning SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Store optimization. Set quarterly and annual OKRs tied to impressions, clicks, MAU, installs, and sales. 
    *   **Team Leadership**: Manage, mentor, and develop the SEO & Organic Growth team. Foster a culture of experimentation, accountability, and continuous learning. Identify and hire for key capability gaps as needed.
    *   **Roadmap Ownership**: Build and maintain a prioritized organic growth roadmap. Balance quick wins with longer-term strategic bets. Present plans and progress to senior leadership, including the CEO.
    *   **Cross-Functional Partnership**: Serve as the organic growth voice in cross-functional planning with AI, Product, Engineering, Content, Brand, Marketing Operations, and International Expansion teams. Ensure organic considerations are embedded in product launches, site architecture decisions, and content strategy.
    *   **Product Roadmap Influence**: Act as a key influencer of the Product roadmap by surfacing organic growth opportunities, user intent data, and search landscape insights that shape feature prioritization, new product bets, and go-to-market timing.
*   **Search Engine Optimization (SEO)  
    **
    *   **SEO Program Ownership**: Own end-to-end SEO performance across QuillBot’s web properties. Drive strategy across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO to secure and defend top positions for high-value keywords.
    *   **Technical SEO**: Lead technical audits and partner with Engineering to resolve crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, site speed, structured data, and mobile-responsiveness issues at scale.
    *   **Content & Keyword Strategy**: Oversee keyword research, content gap analysis, and on-page optimization. Collaborate with the Content team to ensure every page is strategically targeted and continuously improved.
    *   **Link Building & Authority**: Direct link-building and digital PR strategies to grow domain authority. Evaluate backlink quality and build partnerships with authoritative sites.
    *   **Algorithm Resilience**: Monitor Google algorithm updates, diagnose ranking fluctuations, and quickly adapt strategies to protect and grow organic traffic.
*   **Generative Engine Optimisation (GEO)**
    *   **GEO Strategy**: Develop and execute a strategy to maximize QuillBot’s visibility in AI-generated answers and citations across generative search experiences (e.g., Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, etc).
    *   **Content for LLMs**: Work with Content and Product to structure information, schema markup, and authoritative content so that generative engines accurately surface and recommend QuillBot.
    *   **Measurement & Experimentation**: Define GEO-specific metrics, build tracking frameworks, and run experiments to understand how generative surfaces drive traffic and conversions.
    *   **Competitive Intelligence**: Monitor how competitors are cited in generative answers and identify opportunities to increase QuillBot’s share of voice.
*   **App Store Optimisation (ASO)**
    *   **ASO Program Ownership**: Own QuillBot’s organic discoverability and conversion rates in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store.
    *   **Listing Optimization:** Optimize app titles, subtitles, descriptions, keywords, screenshots, and preview videos to improve search rankings and download conversion rates.
    *   **Ratings & Reviews**: Develop strategies to increase the volume and quality of positive ratings and reviews, and work with Product to address recurring user feedback themes.
    *   **A/B Testing**: Design and run store listing experiments to continuously improve conversion. Leverage tools like Google Play Experiments and third-party ASO platforms.
    *   **Market-Specific ASO**: Partner with the International Expansion team to localize and optimize listings for priority markets.
*   **Extension Store Optimisation**
    *   **Extension Visibility**: Own QuillBot’s presence and discoverability in the Chrome Web Store, Safari Extensions Gallery, Microsoft Edge Add-ons, and Firefox Add-ons.
    *   **Listing & CRO**: Optimize extension titles, descriptions, screenshots, and feature graphics. Improve install conversion rates through iterative testing.
    *   **Ratings & Review Strategy**: Drive rating volume and quality for extensions. Coordinate with Product and Support to address negative feedback and reduce churn.
    *   **Cross-Channel Synergy**: Align extension store strategy with SEO and ASO efforts to create a unified organic discovery experience across web, app, and extension surfaces.
*   **Analytics, Reporting & Insights**
    *   **Performance Measurement**: Build and maintain dashboards tracking organic performance across all channels (SEO, ASO, GEO, Extension Stores). Define KPIs and ensure the team is data-driven in decision-making.
    *   **Executive Reporting**: Deliver regular performance updates and strategic insights to senior leadership. Translate complex organic data into clear narratives with actionable recommendations.
    *   **Tool Stack**: Evaluate and manage the organic growth tool stack (e.g., Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Sensor Tower, Screaming Frog, etc).

**Qualifications**

*   8–10 years of progressive experience in SEO and/or organic growth, with at least 3 years in a people-management role.
*   Global experience: demonstrated ability to drive organic growth across multiple markets, regions, and languages—not limited to English-speaking audiences.
*   Demonstrated success managing organic growth for a high-traffic website (+20M monthly active users) and a consumer app with significant install volume.
*   Proven track record of securing and defending #1 positions for competitive keywords
*   Proven ability to build organic visibility from zero for new product launches in highly competitive markets — taking a product from no search presence to top-ranking positions against established incumbents.
*   Deep expertise across on-page, off-page, and technical SEO, with a strong grasp of how search engines crawl, index, and rank content.
*   Hands-on experience with ASO for iOS and/or Android apps, including keyword optimization, listing experiments, and review management.
*   Strong understanding of the generative AI search landscape and emerging GEO best practices.
*   Proficiency with industry tools: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, and at least one ASO platform (preferably Sensor Tower).
*   Experience working with CMS platforms (e.g., WordPress) and comfort with basic HTML/CSS.
*   Excellent communicator who can present data-driven strategies to senior leadership, including C-level stakeholders.
*   Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field.

**Bonus Points**

*   Experience at a SaaS, EdTech, or consumer-tech company with a freemium or subscription business model.
*   Hands-on experience with multilingual and multi-regional SEO and ASO strategies.
*   Familiarity with structured data, schema markup, and Knowledge Graph optimization.
*   Experience with programmatic SEO or large-scale page generation strategies.
*   Experience optimizing browser extension listings in the Chrome Web Store or equivalent platforms.
*   Background in conversion rate optimization (CRO) as it relates to organic landing pages and store listings.
*   Comfortable working across time zones in a fully remote, globally distributed team.

**Why Join QuillBot?**

*   **Ownership & Impact**: Take full ownership of organic growth across every discovery surface and directly influence QuillBot’s trajectory.
*   **Scope & Challenge**: Lead a function that spans SEO, ASO, GEO, and Extension Stores—a rare opportunity to shape organic strategy holistically.
*   **Collaborative Culture**: Work with a passionate, innovative team across Content, Marketing, Product, and Engineering.
*   **Remote Flexibility**: Enjoy the flexibility of working remotely with flexible hours to balance professional and personal life.
*   **Professional Growth**: QuillBot values learning and development, offering opportunities for skill enhancement and career advancement.

**Benefits & Perks**

*   Competitive salary and annual bonus
*   Medical coverage
*   Life and accidental insurance
*   Vacation & leaves of absence (menstrual, flexible, special, and more!)
*   Developmental opportunities through education & developmental reimbursements & professional workshops
*   Maternity & parental leave
*   Hybrid & remote model with flexible working hours
*   On-site & remote company events throughout the year
*   Tech & WFH stipends & new hire allowances
*   Employee referral program
*   Premium access to QuillBot

\*Benefits and benefit amounts differ by region. A comprehensive list applicable to your region will be provided in your interview process.
